app.notovault.description: No ads. No tracking. Your notes with guaranteed privacy.
app.notovault.name: NotoVault
hero.description: Mobile app development, digital tools and small projects built with attention to detail.
meta.title: Nana Bytes
philosophy.description: Less complexity, more utility. Lightweight, intuitive and maintainable applications.
philosophy.title: Nana Bytes Philosophy
privacy.backup.body1: Some applications may benefit from Android's automatic backup system.
privacy.backup.body2: If the user has enabled device backup associated with their Google account, Android may include certain application data in those backups to facilitate information restoration when changing devices or after a reset.
privacy.backup.body3: Nana Bytes does not have access to these backups and cannot view, modify or delete information stored through Google services.
privacy.backup.title: Android backups
privacy.changes.body: This privacy policy may be updated to reflect changes in applications or legal requirements. The most recent version will always be available on this page.
privacy.changes.title: Changes to this policy
privacy.collect.body: Applications developed by Nana Bytes do not collect, store or transmit personally identifiable information to our own or third-party servers.
privacy.collect.title: Information we collect
privacy.contact.body: If you have any questions regarding this privacy policy, you can contact:
privacy.contact.name: Nana Bytes
privacy.contact.title: Contact
privacy.intro.body: Nana Bytes develops mobile applications focused on user privacy. Our apps are designed to work locally on the device and do not require account creation or login to use.
privacy.intro.title: Introduction
privacy.local.body: Information generated and stored by the user is saved exclusively on their device through Android's local storage mechanisms. This data is used only for the normal operation of the application and is not accessible by Nana Bytes.
privacy.local.title: Local data storage
privacy.rights.body: The user can delete all information stored by the application at any time by:
privacy.rights.item2: Deleting the application data from Android settings.
privacy.rights.title: User rights
privacy.third.body: Applications may use services provided by Google Play for distribution, updates and basic operation. Data processing by these services is governed by Google's privacy policies.
privacy.third.title: Third-party services
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
section1.description: We focus on creating simple, fast and well-designed applications to solve real everyday problems.
section1.title: We build useful apps
section2.title: Applications
terms.accept.body: By downloading, installing or using any application developed by Nana Bytes, you agree to these terms and conditions of use.
terms.accept.title: Acceptance of terms
terms.avail.body: Nana Bytes may update, modify or discontinue an application at any time without obligation to maintain specific features or compatibility with future versions of operating systems.
terms.avail.title: Availability
terms.changes.body: Nana Bytes may update these terms when necessary. The current version will always be available on this page.
terms.changes.title: Changes to these terms
terms.contact.body: For any questions regarding these terms:
terms.contact.name: Nana Bytes
terms.contact.title: Contact
terms.disclaimer.body: Applications are provided "as is", without express or implied warranties. Nana Bytes shall not be liable for data loss, service interruptions or damages arising from the use or inability to use the applications, to the extent permitted by applicable law.
terms.disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
terms.ip.body: All rights to applications, designs, code, texts, images and other associated content belong to Nana Bytes or their respective owners.
terms.ip.title: Intellectual property
terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.use.body: Applications are provided for personal use and in accordance with applicable law. The user is responsible for their use of the applications.
terms.use.title: Use of applications
